core.title: Tools & Workflows
core.description: The AI tools, automation workflows, and systems used to manage, build, and scale the portfolio. Prompts, pipelines, and productivity architecture.

content.about: This channel documents the operational layer: how AI tools get wired together, what prompt structures actually work for production use, and how the day-to-day workflow runs across 80+ properties.
content.what_to_expect: Tool walkthroughs, prompt engineering sessions, workflow automation builds, and the honest answer to what saves time versus what looks good in a LinkedIn post.

seo.meta_description: AI tools, automation workflows, and productivity systems for managing an 80+ property digital asset portfolio.
